# _Get Piedmont_ Insurance

## With Jill Piedmont: _She Knows Insurance_ {#subtitle}

<div class="circle-container">
  <img src="images/jill.jpg" alt="Jill Piedmont Derleth">
</div>

<p style="margin-top: 1.25em; margin-bottom: 1.5em;">
One thing we might all agree on these days is that insurance feels broken, like
sometimes no one is there to get us the help we need.

I know. After another car crashed into mine years ago, my mobility was never the
same. **I've battled big insurance companies while battling to walk again at the
same time.**
</p>

---


Now I am a licensed broker and contracted with a wide range of insurance
companies. I offer a variety of insurance products in all 50 states---not
just health insurance.

It would be an honor to help you navigate Medicare, or health insurance for
those under 65 years old. I can help you find ancillary support, such as
disability or critical illness insurance, travel insurance, and several other
options to protect you and your family. I look forward to hearing from you!

Please feel free to contact me by phone or email.

I also invite to use the form below to tell me more about you and how I can help.
I will use the information you provide to research preliminary options, then
contact you as soon as possible to discuss your options.

<br>

<p style="text-align: center">  <!--; font-size: 0.95rem;"> -->

  <i title='Phone' class='fa-solid fa-phone'></i>
    <span style="margin-right: 10px;"></span>
    <a href="tel:+15855586919">(585) 558-6919</a> <span style="margin-right: 10px;"></span>|<span style="margin-right: 10px;"></span>
  <i title='Email' class='fa-solid fa-envelope'>
   <span style="margin-right: 10px;"></span>
   </i> [jill@getpiedmont.com](mailto:jill@getpiedmont.com)
   <span style="margin-right: 10px;"></span>|<span style="margin-right: 10px;"></span>
    NPN: 16461013
</p>

<br>

<!-- GOOGLE FORM HERE!!!! -->

<iframe src="https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeXGgfIGxfxbbvX0NgqIiCvu-ggiUP18GAKP_W6N9-AdZB9Bw/viewform?embedded=true" width="640" height="3203" frameborder="0" marginheight="0" marginwidth="0">Loading…</iframe>
